title: pimpinella rigidiuscula
intro: Pimpinella rigidiuscula, also known as Bhuti or Bhut, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Pimpinella rigidiuscula can be made into teas, decoctions, or powders, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
